name: A.D. Works Group Co., Ltd.
summary: A.D. Works Group Co., Ltd. operates in the real estate business. It engages in the real estate leasing and sale activities. The company is also involved in the provision of property management and real estate consulting services, as well as in the real estate tech business. In addition, it offers renovation and repair services. The company was founded in 1886 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
